overview: Live Now Recovery is a privacy-first, real-time recovery and resource platform for Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT), harm reduction, and long-term support. Piloted in Ohio, built on Internet Computer Protocol with a strict NO-PHI policy, real-time provider status, Sentinel risk prediction, and soul-bound on-chain credentials.
features: Real-time MAT provider search and warm handoffs across Ohio
Sentinel prediction engine with compound risk scoring and county choropleth overlays
Soul-bound on-chain credential system with 12 types, leaderboard, and public gallery
Admin dashboard with live data, emergency broadcast toggle, and configurable email notifications
Private investor pitch page at /pitch with full-screen access code gate
Citizens Hub with live safety alerts, incident feed, and naloxone location map
Provider and volunteer profiles with Twitter/X-style design and verification badges
Site-wide emergency broadcast and maintenance mode banners controlled from admin settings
